name: System1, Inc.
summary: PART I . Overview Throughout this report, the "Company," "System1," "we," "us," "our" and other similar terms refer to System1, Inc. and its subsidiaries. We operate several flagship brands across multiple consumer verticals, including shopping, travel and search, and a best-in-class customer acquisition and marketing platform powered by Artificial Intelligence ("AI") and machine learning. Our platform is omnichannel and omnivertical, delivering high-intent customers to our advertising partners ...
